explanation: I entered the seeded username for the local demo account.
I entered the shared seeded password for the example user.
I signed in so the authenticated transaction tools can load.
I opened the new transaction wizard from the top navigation.
I searched for Darrel Ortiz so the receiver list narrows to the intended person.
I selected Darrel Ortiz as the receiver for the request.
I entered a unique request note so the new row can be tracked across the feed and detail views.
I submitted the request so the newly created transaction can be verified and reopened.
I returned to the transaction feeds so I can verify the created request from the personal feed.
I switched to the personal feed to verify the new request row from a second surface.
I reopened the request from the personal feed so the second mutation starts from the newly created transaction.
I entered the follow-up comment as the second mutation on the reopened request.
I submitted the follow-up comment from the transaction detail view.
I returned to the transaction feeds so the updated social state can be verified from the feed.
I switched back to the personal feed to verify that the same request row now shows the updated comment count.
I reopened the updated request a second time so the saved follow-up comment is reverified from the detail surface.

action.summary: I created a Darrel Ortiz request, verified it from the personal feed, reopened it, added a follow-up comment, reverified the updated feed row, and reopened it again to confirm the saved comment persisted.

explanation: The created request and the saved follow-up comment have both been reverified now, so I am ending the task.
